{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Midnight Fang
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] is of the blood of the [[Midnight Fang]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“I am Helethshan, blood of the Midnight Fang, and I will accept you into my service.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
